tag.name: Waulter - Consent State Sync (localStorage + Cookie)

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  var dl = window.dataLayer || [];
  var lastEvent = null;
  
  // Find the most recent Waulter:Decision in dataLayer
  for (var i = dl.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (dl[i] && dl[i].event === 'Waulter:Decision') {
      lastEvent = dl[i];
      break;
    }
  }
  
  if (!lastEvent) return;
  
  var state = {
    decision: lastEvent.decision || '',
    purposes: lastEvent.purposes || [],
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  };
  
  var stateJson = JSON.stringify(state);
  
  // Write to localStorage
  try {
    localStorage.setItem('waulter_consent', stateJson);
  } catch(e) {}
  
  // Write to cookie (90 day expiry)
  try {
    var expires = new Date();
    expires.setDate(expires.getDate() + 90);
    document.cookie = 'waulter_consent=' + encodeURIComponent(stateJson) + 
      ';expires=' + expires.toUTCString() + 
      ';path=/;SameSite=Lax';
  } catch(e) {}
})();
</script>

tag.notes: Writes consent state (decision, purposes, timestamp) to localStorage and cookie on every Waulter:Decision event. Fires regardless of consent status.

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Core: fires when user grants ALL consent (decision contains 'allow').

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Exception
trigger.notes: Core: blocks tags when full consent ('allow') has NOT been given.

trigger.name: Waulter - Decision Changed
trigger.notes: Core: fires on page init and consent change. Filters out events where no decision exists yet.

trigger.name: Waulter - Analytics & Optimization Granted
trigger.notes: Category: fires tags when ANY analytics & optimization purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Analytics & Optimization Exception
trigger.notes: Category: blocks tags when NO analytics & optimization purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Granted
trigger.notes: Category: fires tags when ANY marketing purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Exception
trigger.notes: Category: blocks tags when NO marketing purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Granted
trigger.notes: Category: fires tags when ANY advanced tracking purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Exception
trigger.notes: Category: blocks tags when NO advanced tracking purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Functionality Granted
trigger.notes: Category: fires tags when ANY functionality purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Functionality Exception
trigger.notes: Category: blocks tags when NO functionality purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - AB Testing Granted
trigger.notes: Purpose-level: fires A/B testing tags when PU050 is specifically accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - AB Testing Exception
trigger.notes: Purpose-level: blocks A/B testing tags when PU050 is not accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Services Exception v1
trigger.notes: Backward compat: EQUALS-based marketing exception. Kept for existing container migrations.

trigger.name: Waulter - Marketing Services Exception v2
trigger.notes: Backward compat: REGEX-based marketing exception. Kept for existing container migrations.

trigger.name: Waulter - No Consent (Block GA4)
trigger.notes: Composite trigger group. After import, manually add child triggers: Analytics & Optimization Exception + Marketing Exception.

variable.name: Waulter - Analytics & Optimization Allowed
variable.notes: Category 5 — Website Improvement & Optimization. True if ANY analytics purpose is accepted. Controls tags requiring analytics_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - Marketing Allowed
variable.notes: Category 7 — Marketing. True if ANY marketing purpose is accepted. Controls tags requiring ad_storage, ad_personalization, ad_user_data.

variable.name: Waulter - Advanced Tracking Allowed
variable.notes: Category 6 — Other (Advanced Individual Tracking). True if ANY advanced tracking purpose is accepted. Controls tags requiring analytics_storage (heatmaps, recordings).

variable.name: Waulter - Functionality Allowed

parameter.value:
function() {
  var purposes = {{Waulter - Purposes}};
  if (Array.isArray(purposes)) {
    return purposes.indexOf("PU025") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU026") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU027") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU028") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU029") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU031") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU032") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU034") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU035") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU036") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU037") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU038") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU041") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU042") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU043") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU044") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU075") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU081") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU095") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU097") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU098") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU099") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU100") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU101") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU102") > -1;
  }
  return false;
}

variable.notes: Categories 2+3+4 — Website Functionality, Security & Monitoring. True if ANY functional purpose is accepted. Controls tags requiring functionality_storage, personalization_storage.
